name: Voker
description: Analytics platform for AI agents — track conversation intents, corrections, resolutions, and business impact. Python & TypeScript SDKs with 2-line integration.

skills.name: Intent Detection
skills.description: Automatically classify user goals from conversation turns and track resolution rates across all agent interactions.

skills.name: Conversation Analytics
skills.description: Query conversation timelines, detect friction patterns, and surface knowledge gaps from agent interaction logs.

skills.name: Performance Tracking
skills.description: Measure agent performance improvements over time and compare versions to know when to roll back or ship.
